workflowInfo.workflowDescription: Self-inventory of the z/OSMF instance using rest and setVariable steps

variable.name: INFO_VERSION
variable.label: z/OSMF Version
variable.description: Filled by the getInfo rest step via propertyMapping

variable.name: REPORT_NAME
variable.label: Report Name
variable.abstract: Derived by the deriveNames setVariable step
variable.description: Built from INFO_VERSION by the setVariable step

variable.name: PROBE_JOBID
variable.label: Probe JOBID
variable.abstract: JOBID returned by the job-submit rest step
variable.description: Filled by the submitProbe rest step via propertyMapping

variable.name: PROBE_STATUS
variable.label: Probe HTTP Status
variable.abstract: Actual HTTP status code from the job-submit rest step
variable.description: Filled by the submitProbe rest step via actualStatusCode

step.name: getInfo
step.title: Query z/OSMF Info
step.description: Calls GET /zosmf/info and captures the API version
step.instructions: Queries the z/OSMF info endpoint and captures api_version into INFO_VERSION.

step.name: deriveNames
step.title: Derive Report Name
step.description: Sets REPORT_NAME from the captured version using setVariable
step.instructions: Builds the report name from INFO_VERSION (currently: ${instance-INFO_VERSION}).

step.name: submitProbe
step.title: Submit Probe Job
step.description: Submits a trivial IEFBR14 job via the jobs REST API and captures its JOBID
step.instructions: Submits an IEFBR14 probe job through PUT /zosmf/restjobs/jobs and captures the returned jobid into PROBE_JOBID and the HTTP status into PROBE_STATUS.

step.name: writeReport
step.title: Write Inventory Report
step.description: Echoes every captured/derived value, proving cross-step variable flow
step.instructions: Prints the inventory built from values produced by the earlier steps.

template.inlineTemplate: #!/bin/sh echo "===== z/OSMF SELF-INVENTORY =====" echo "z/OSMF API version : ${instance-INFO_VERSION}" echo "Report name : ${instance-REPORT_NAME}" echo "Probe JOBID : ${instance-PROBE_JOBID}" echo "Probe HTTP status : ${instance-PROBE_STATUS}" echo "=================================" if [ -z "${instance-INFO_VERSION}" ]; then echo "ERROR: INFO_VERSION did not flow from the rest step" exit 1 fi echo "SUCCESS: variables flowed across step types"
